text: I have a chesty cough with a bit of phlegm and some tightness in my chest. 9 day(s) now.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 5 day(s).

text: Coughing a lot, bringing up darker mucus, feverish, noticeably short of breath. 10 day(s). My temperature is really elevated.

text: I have a bad productive cough — bringing up yellowish phlegm — and it hurts to breathe deeply. 7 day(s) like this, though I notice it's not improving. I have a very high fever.

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 10 day(s), though it seems to be slowly resolving. My temperature is really elevated.

text: I have a bad productive cough — bringing up yellowish phlegm — and it hurts to breathe deeply. 9 day(s) like this, and I feel more unwell than yesterday. I'm burning up.

text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 11 day(s) now. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Sharp pain in my chest when I breathe in, productive cough, fever. Worsened over 9 day(s), though I notice it's not improving.

text: I feel like I'm suffocating. Severe shortness of breath, chest agony, high fever. 6 day(s) like this. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 16 day(s) and scared, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I'm burning up.
